text:
I wasn’t “outraged” about them killing off Joel in The Last of Us Part 2, you want to kill off a character to show “stakes” or “consequences” that is fine and it could be good story writing.

What pissed everyone off was then trying to make Abby a sympathetic character AFTER she killed Joel.  

If The Last of Us Part 2 was solely Abby’s story about her trying to find the man that killed her father and it ended with her killing Joel, that might have been palatable. 

A girl looking for justice in a post apocalyptic world, could have been enjoyable.  Then Part 3 is about the cycle of violence and revenge, that would have been a good story but no we got this garbage instead.

Casting diminutive Bella Ramsey as Ellie meant that had they gone with an actress more similar to the LoU2 Abby, like body builder actor Katy O'Brien, the eventual showdown would have looked like Game of Thrones Lyanna Mormont, who Bella played then, was going to get crushed by another giant. I like Bella in some of her other roles, mostly the British ones where she talks in her normal voice, but her American accent comes across like an angry 4th grade girl.

So the casting of Katlyn Dever as Abby for a nemesis for Bella Ramsey's Ellie made sense.

The show does drag on. For such a short run show, its a bit boring. 

As far as Ellie being gay, that was expected, she was in the game. But, the show makes her so dumb that I'm surprised Ellie didn't ask Dina if she was the bio father.
